name: image-paste
author: lumine-code
description: Paste clipboard images into projects as image files.

assetsDirectory.title: Assets Directory
assetsDirectory.description: Project-relative directory used when saving images pasted into text editors.

forwardSlash.description: Insert image paths with forward slashes in text editors.

imagePreview.title: Image Preview
imagePreview.description: Show an image preview in the save dialog.
